Apa yang saya butuhkan: • Beberapa versi logo (versi utama, versi monokrom, favicon) dalam format vektor (AI, SVG) dan raster (PNG, JPG) beresolusi tinggi. • File sumber yang mudah diedit serta panduan singkat penggu

title: Logo Modern untuk Brand
desc: Saya membuka sayembara desain untuk menciptakan sebuah logo bergaya modern. Apa yang saya butuhkan • Konsep logo yang segar, bersih, dan relevan dengan tren desain modern. • File final dalam format vektor (AI atau SVG) + pratinjau PNG beresolusi tinggi. • Versi warna penuh dan versi monokrom agar mudah diterapkan di berbagai media. Kriteria penilaian • Orisinalitas dan kekuatan visual. • Keterbacaan pada ukuran kecil

title: Logo Recreation in Vector Format
desc: Need logo recreated as a fully editable vector file (AI/SVG/EPS). I already have a logo image with my brand name and mascot. I need it professionally recreated to ensure high-quality scalability and editability. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and vector graphics, ensuring the final product is both visually appealing and functional.

title: Logo Refinement for Consistent Use
desc: Overview I have a logo created on Canva that needs adjustments so it can be used across all documents and our website without any display issues. Scope of Work - Refine the existing Canva logo to eliminate fade issues - Ensure the logo functions correctly on various backgrounds - Provide logo files in multiple formats for print and digital use

title: Logo Refresh and Improvement Project
desc: We are seeking a talented graphic designer to refresh and improve our existing logo. The ideal candidate will have a keen eye for design and be able to modernize our logo while maintaining its core identity. The project will involve exploring new color palettes, typography, and design elements. title: Logo Vector Conversion
desc: Sure! Here’s a more casual version of the job description: --- Hey there! I’m looking for someone to help turn my logo into a vector format.
